spec_natural_language: function upgradeTo(address) MUST revert when caller is not the owner

violated_invariant.expected_behavior: Only the owner should be able to upgrade the contract implementation; all other callers must be rejected

extraction_reasoning: The finding explicitly states the invariant: 'For any caller C != owner, WellUpgradeable.upgradeTo(addr) must revert.' The report clearly identifies the missing onlyOwner modifier on _authorizeUpgrade which enables the upgradeTo function to be called by anyone. The PoC demonstrates a non-owner successfully calling upgradeTo.
